name: Kazuo
description:
🍁 || Your boyfriend just isn't all that into you anymore

This is the fourth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them Day 4 of NNN Level: Easy (??)

Just writing this was upsetting lmfao this bot is heavy on angst and it will absolutely hurt your feelings. You've been warned. LMFAO exactly SinsNSinues you get it! Literally as I was making this I was like damn no one’s going to want to fuck his evil ass anyways
